title: Verify Hot Bin Disable Leaves Chutes Closed After Exchange
summary: Use the training source to verify the documented behavior that hot bin disable does not reopen chutes after the exchange is complete.
when_to_use: Use when reviewing or confirming expected chute behavior for a hot bin disable condition after an exchange has completed.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to enable or disable hot bin behavior.
Do not use this runbook to force a chute to reopen.
Do not use this runbook as a recovery procedure when chute behavior differs from the documented source statement.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Observe the hot bin disable condition, confirm exchange completion, check chute state, and record whether observed behavior matches the source.

safety_notes: This source supports a verification of documented behavior only.
Do not infer or perform a chute reopen action from this source because no such procedure is provided.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the training source or documented hot bin disable behavior
Ability to observe chute state after exchange completion

access_required: Access to the training source statement for hot bin disable behavior
Ability to observe the affected chute or chute handling sequence
system_preconditions: The condition under review is hot bin disable
An exchange has completed for the affected tote or chute handling sequence

visual_references.description: Training video frame stating that hot bin disable will not reopen chutes after the exchange is complete.

steps.title: Identify hot bin disable condition
steps.purpose: Ensure the review is being performed for the specific condition described by the source.
steps.instruction: Identify that the condition being reviewed is hot bin disable, using the source terminology.
steps.expected_result: The operator confirms the review is for a hot bin disable condition.
steps.healthy_condition: The condition under review matches the source statement about hot bin disable.
steps.failure_condition: The condition cannot be confirmed as hot bin disable from the available source context.

actions.label: Confirm hot bin disable context
actions.exact_action: Identify that the condition being reviewed is hot bin disable, using the source terminology.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the training frame text and transcript context describing hot bin behavior and the statement about hot bin disable not reopening chutes after exchange.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the condition cannot be tied to hot bin disable using the source-supported terminology.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Hot bin disable will not reopen chutes after the exchange is complete.

steps.title: Verify exchange is complete
steps.purpose: Confirm the timing condition required by the source statement before evaluating chute state.
steps.instruction: Verify that an exchange has completed for the affected tote or chute handling sequence.
steps.expected_result: The operator confirms the exchange is complete before checking whether the chute reopened.
steps.healthy_condition: Exchange completion is confirmed for the affected tote or chute handling sequence.

actions.label: Confirm exchange completion
actions.exact_action: Verify that an exchange has completed for the affected tote or chute handling sequence.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the exchange process description showing the tote exchange sequence and timing context.
Look for the source statement that specifically applies after the exchange is complete.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if exchange completion cannot be confirmed.
Stop or escalate if the observed sequence does not clearly correspond to the affected tote or chute handling sequence.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Hot bin disable will not reopen chutes after the exchange is complete.
This artifact describes the tote exchange process.

steps.title: Check chute state after exchange
steps.purpose: Compare the observed chute state to the documented hot bin disable behavior from the source.
steps.instruction: Check the chute state after exchange completion against the source statement that hot bin disable will not reopen chutes after the exchange is complete.
steps.expected_result: The chute remains closed after exchange completion when hot bin disable behavior applies.
steps.healthy_condition: The chute does not reopen after the exchange is complete.
steps.failure_condition: The chute reopens after the exchange is complete or the chute state cannot be verified.

actions.label: Observe chute state
actions.exact_action: Check the chute state after exchange completion against the source statement that hot bin disable will not reopen chutes after the exchange is complete.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the slide or transcript text stating that hot bin disable will not reopen chutes after the exchange is complete.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the chute behavior does not match the documented source statement.
Stop if chute state cannot be observed or verified from the available view.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Hot bin disable will not reopen chutes after the exchange is complete.

steps.title: Record verification result
steps.purpose: Capture whether the observed chute behavior matches the documented source behavior.
steps.instruction: Record whether the chute remains closed in accordance with the documented behavior.
steps.expected_result: A verification result is recorded as matching or not matching the documented behavior.
steps.healthy_condition: The recorded result shows the chute remained closed after exchange completion.
steps.failure_condition: The recorded result shows the chute did not remain closed, or no result is recorded.

actions.label: Document observed result
actions.exact_action: Record whether the chute remains closed in accordance with the documented behavior.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the recorded observation does not match the documented source statement.

success_criteria: The condition is confirmed as hot bin disable.
Exchange completion is confirmed for the affected tote or chute handling sequence.
The chute is verified to remain closed after exchange completion in accordance with the source.
healthy_conditions: Hot bin disable applies to the reviewed condition.
The chute remains closed after exchange completion.
failure_conditions: The condition cannot be confirmed as hot bin disable.
The chute reopens after exchange completion.
The chute state cannot be verified.
Observed behavior does not match the documented source statement.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the chute behavior does not match the documented source statement.
Do not infer how to force a chute reopen because the source does not provide that procedure.
